title: Jeff Hoover
compiled_truth: Jeff Hoover is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-23 to 2001-05-08), Jeff Hoover sent 4 and received 26 emails, totalling 30 interactions. Top correspondents: [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (3), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (1), [Charles Ward](people/charles-ward) (1). Mailbox folders observed: _americas.
